message:
feat(workers): Add worker capabilities command and API endpoint

Introduces 'rch workers capabilities' command to query runtime capabilities
(installed toolchains, runtimes, features) from all configured workers. This
enables intelligent command routing based on worker capabilities.

Changes:
- Add WorkersAction::Capabilities variant with --refresh and --command flags
- Add WorkersCapabilitiesReport struct for JSON output
- Add WorkerCapabilitiesFromApi and response types
- Add /workers/capabilities API endpoint with optional refresh parameter
- Add handle_workers_capabilities() to probe workers
- Add CLI parsing tests for new command
- Code formatting improvements (rustfmt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
